name: Study
definition: An action to make an Intelligence check about memory, books, clues, or knowledge
full_text: When you take the Study action, you make an Intelligence check to study your memory, a book, a clue, or another source of knowledge and call to mind an important piece of information about it.

areas_of_knowledge: Arcana: Spells, magic items, eldritch symbols, magical traditions, planes, certain creatures
History: Historic events, people, civilizations, wars, certain creatures
Nature: Terrain, flora, weather, certain creatures
Religion: Deities, hierarchies, rites, symbols, cults, certain creatures
